query: Find stale issues where the reporter ghosted after a maintainer asked for repro info.
expected_behavior: Applies the STALE_NO_REPRO classifier with three signals (S1: last maintainer comment matches needs-info shape; S2: reporter inactive >60d/>180d; S3: needs-info or awaiting-response label).
Treats this category specially: NEVER drafts a close, only a revival comment. Chains into close-superseded-issues with --revival-only flag.
Sets scheduled_close_at to 14 days post-revival in the JSON sidecar so a follow-up run can pick up no-response cases.
Drafts a polite revival comment that summarizes the prior needs-info request and gives an explicit 14-day window.
